description: You are a VFX compositor. Create a 'wet floor' reflection effect for the character animation using the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The output resolution must be 1920x1080. Arrange the scene with the original character in the upper half of the frame and a vertically flipped reflection at 50% opacity in the lower half. Render the animation as a PNG sequence to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/reflection/.
